summary: Compute an approximate nearest-neighbour patch-correspondence field (PatchField) from a source image into a target image via deterministic, seeded PatchMatch. Optional target/source masks select the hole pixels to match and the eligible source anchors. Emits the field plus a convergence report.

inputs.name: source
inputs.doc: The source image coherent patches are drawn from.

inputs.name: target
inputs.doc: The target image each correspondence is matched against.

inputs.name: target_mask
inputs.doc: Optional: target pixels (> 0.5) needing a correspondence (the hole). Absent means every target pixel is matched.

inputs.name: source_mask
inputs.doc: Optional: source pixels (> 0.5) eligible as anchors (the known region). Absent means every source pixel is eligible.

outputs.name: field
outputs.doc: The approximate nearest-neighbour field (src_x, src_y, cost per target pixel).

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The search report carrying SolverData (iterations, per-iteration cost history, fixed-point/stop reason).

differential.reason: patch_field has a single cpu.reference implementation; it is verified against an independent brute-force NNF oracle, not a second backend

perceptual.reason: the patch field is verified by exact oracle agreement and seeded determinism, not a perceptual metric
